output: Implemented T3. Added `VideoEditorLightboxOverlay` as a sibling overlay outside `MediaLightbox`, rendered from `VideoEditorProvider` when `navResult.indicator` is present. The overlay is fixed at the top center on `z-[80]`, uses `bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm`, shows the shot badge plus in-group position when applicable, shows the overall list counter when there is more than one item, and applies `pointer-events-none` so it cannot interfere with lightbox close or navigation interactions. Added a focused component test for the exact positioning/layer classes and reran the provider/navigation tests. Checkpoint written to `.megaplan/plans/add-lightbox-navigation-left-20260413-0048/execution_batch_3.json`.
deviations: Advisory audit finding: Git status shows changed files not claimed by any task: .megaplan/plans/add-lightbox-navigation-left-20260413-0048, .megaplan/plans/add-test-baselining-to-the-20260410-2059, .megaplan/schemas/finalize.json
Advisory audit finding: Sense check SC4 is missing an executor acknowledgment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added `VideoEditorLightboxOverlay` as a small sibling overlay to the lightbox render path in `VideoEditorProvider`, driven by `navResult.indicator` from T2. The component renders a top-centered `z-[80]` pill with `bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm`, shows the shot badge and in-group position when available, shows the overall list counter when there is more than one item, and applies `pointer-events-none` so it cannot interfere with close or navigation interaction. Verified the provider now renders the overlay as a sibling next to `MediaLightbox`. `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` passed. `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/components/VideoEditorLightboxOverlay.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useVideoEditorLightboxNavigation.test.ts` passed with 6/6 tests green.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The overlay root uses `pointer-events-none fixed left-1/2 top-4 z-[80] -translate-x-1/2`, which places it at the top-center on the same lightbox layer without intercepting interaction. The dedicated overlay component test asserts those classes directly, and the provider now renders it as a sibling to `MediaLightbox` rather than inside the shared lightbox pipeline.
